prompt:
Classify the following email into exactly one of these categories: SPAM, NOT_SPAM.

Email:
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS! You have been selected as our LUCKY WINNER!!!
From: prize-notify@win-cash-rewards247.biz
Body: Dear Friend, You have been randomly selected to receive $5,000,000 USD from the Global Lottery Commission. To claim your prize, reply with your full name, home address, bank account number, and a processing fee of $299. Act now — offer expires in 24 hours!

Respond with only the label: SPAM or NOT_SPAM. No explanation.

Classify the following email into exactly one of these categories: SPAM, NOT_SPAM.

Email:
Subject: Re: Your proposal for the data pipeline migration
From: sarah.kim@acmecorp.com
Body: Hi Rishav, Thank you for sending over the proposal. I reviewed it with our VP of Engineering and we are interested in moving forward. Could we schedule a 30-minute call this Thursday or Friday to discuss the timeline and scope? Looking forward to speaking with you.

Respond with only the label: SPAM or NOT_SPAM. No explanation.

Classify the following email into exactly one of these categories: SPAM, NOT_SPAM.

Email:
Subject: Action required: Reset your password immediately
From: security-noreply@accounts-google.support-login.net
Body: We detected unusual sign-in activity on your Google account. To secure your account, click the link below within 1 hour or your account will be permanently suspended. Reset now: http://accounts-google.support-login.net/reset?token=xK93mZ&redirect=steal-credentials.ru

Note: The sender domain is not google.com. The link redirects to a non-Google domain.

Respond with only the label: SPAM or NOT_SPAM. No explanation.
